sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77703" key="panupe/rfrwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παν-ῠπέρφρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n77703.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exceeding haughty</tr_>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg001:61:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
